scripts.install: npm --prefix hosting install && npm --prefix functions install
scripts.build: npm --prefix hosting run build && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix hosting run lint && npm --prefix functions run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix hosting run test && npm --prefix functions run test
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix hosting run coverage && npm --prefix functions run coverage
scripts.emulators: npm run emulators:kill && mkdir -p .artifacts/firebase && cd .artifacts/firebase && firebase --config ../../firebase.json emulators:start --project "${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-tokiwa-template}"
scripts.emulators:kill: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs -r kill -9 && lsof -ti :9099 | xargs -r kill -9 && lsof -ti :9199 | xargs -r kill -9 && lsof -ti :4000 | xargs -r kill -9
